steps.title: Translate 'varied between' to compound inequality
steps.content:
When a value varies between two numbers, that value is at least the lower number and at most the upper number.

The speed is at least 175 mph: $s \geq 175$
The speed is at most 195 mph: $s \leq 195$

steps.title: Combine into a single compound inequality
steps.content:
When both conditions must be true simultaneously, combine them:
$$175 \leq s \leq 195$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
